rings.description: Safe home base for prep, shopping, and progression.
Low threat frontier with basic enemies.
rings.briefing: The city's edge. Former checkpoints, now feral territory. The scouts who came back don't talk about what they saw.
rings.extraction_flavor: You take what you can carry. The inner frontier closes behind you.

rings.briefing: The Mid Wastes. The previous expedition's gear litters the ground here. Their logs end mid-sentence.
rings.extraction_flavor: The Wastes don't mourn the living. You count yourself fortunate.

rings.description: Elite threats and Warden approach path.
rings.briefing: The Void's threshold. The Warden waits somewhere ahead. You feel its weight before you see it.
rings.extraction_flavor: The Void releases you. The weight of what you've witnessed stays behind.
